title: odontites ruber subsp. lanceolatus
intro: Odontites ruber subsp. lanceolatus, also known as red toothwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to stimulate the digestion. The health benefits of Odontites ruber subsp. lanceolatus include its potential to help with urinary issues and to support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including kidney problems and digestive issues.
